# Claw · llms.txt

> A practitioner's field notebook for AI tools you can run, wire, script, compare,
> or operationally reason about — Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, NotebookLM,
> Microsoft Copilot Studio + Agents Toolkit, GitHub Copilot, OpenClaw, and the MCP
> servers that wire them together. Independent reference by Sush.

## Site

- Home: https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/
- Repo: https://github.com/susanthgit/claw-planet
- Sister: https://agents.aguidetocloud.com/ (Agentic Planet — for MCP/agent builders)
- Licence: CC BY 4.0 where applicable

## Vendors covered (Phase 1)

- OpenClaw — the open-source agent runtime
- Anthropic — Claude Code, Claude API, MCP server catalogue, Claude.ai
- OpenAI — Codex CLI, OpenAI Agents SDK, Apps SDK
- Google — Gemini CLI, NotebookLM, Google AI Studio
- Microsoft — Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit (ATK), Copilot Studio (builder-only · public sources)

Phase 2 (later): Meta/Llama, Mistral, xAI, Perplexity.

## Foundation pages

- Methodology: https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/methodology/
- About: https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/about/
- Colophon: https://claw.aguidetocloud.com/colophon/

## Voice

Plain English. Honest take. Examples · scenarios · comparisons.
"Why does this matter" for important concepts. No marketing voice.
Forbidden words enforced in CI.

## Verification states

Every applicable page declares its state:

- sourced — researched from public docs, not personally tested yet (most entries start here)
- tried — Sush or a contributor ran it on real hardware (date + version + platform captured)
- verified — tried and considered correct (no surprises)
- disputed — a reader has raised a correctness issue
- planned — stub, not in nav

## Scope guardrails (what Claw does NOT publish)

- Prompt-engineering articles
- Model benchmark rankings
- AI ethics / regulation commentary
- General "what is AI?" explainers (those live on Plain AI)
- Vendor PR / marketing reposts
- AI news / punditry
- Customer engagement detail (data classification rule)

## Independence

Independent reference by Sush. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic,
OpenAI, Google, Microsoft, the OpenClaw project, or any plugin author unless
explicitly stated. Sush works at Microsoft — all Microsoft content here uses
only publicly-sourced material (Microsoft Learn, official blogs, public GitHub,
his own experiments). No customer engagement detail.
